biogeographical_realms_list.description: Returns a list of biogeographic realm codes

biogeographical_realms_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a biogeographical realm code

comprehensive_groups_list.description: Returns a list of comprehensive groups

comprehensive_groups_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a comprehensive group name

conservation_actions_list.description: Returns a list of conservation actions

conservation_actions_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a conservation action code

countries_list.description: Returns a list of countries by ISO alpha-2 code

countries_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given country ISO alpha-2 code

faos_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for an FAO code

growth_forms_list.description: Returns a list of growth forms

growth_forms_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given growth form code

green_status_all.description: Returns a list of all Green Status assessments

habitats_list.description: Returns a list of habitat codes

habitats_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given habitat code

information_api_version.description: Returns the current version number of the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species API

information_red_list_version.description: Returns the current IUCN Red List of Threatened Species version

population_trends_list.description: Returns a list of population trends

population_trends_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given population trend code

red_list_categories_list.description: Returns a list of Red List categories

red_list_categories_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given Red List category code

research_list.description: Returns a list of research codes

research_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given research code

scopes_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given scope code

statistics_count.description: Return count of the number of species with assessments

stresses_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given stress code

systems_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given system code

taxa_by_sis.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given SIS id

taxa_by_scientific_name.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given genus_name and species_name and optional infra_name

taxa_kingdom_list.description: Returns a list of all kingdom names

taxa_kingdom_assessments.description: Returns a collection of the latest assessments for a given kingdom_name

taxa_phylum_list.description: Returns a list of all phylum names

taxa_phylum_assessments.description: Returns a collection of the latest assessments for a given phylum_name

taxa_class_list.description: Returns a list of all class names

taxa_class_assessments.description: Returns a collection of the latest assessments for a given class_name

taxa_order_list.description: Returns a list of all order names

taxa_order_assessments.description: Returns a collection of the latest assessments for a given order_name

taxa_family_list.description: Returns a list of all family names

taxa_family_assessments.description: Returns a collection of the latest assessments for a given family_name

taxa_possibly_extinct.description: Returns a collection of all latest global assessments for taxa that are possibly extinct

taxa_possibly_extinct_in_the_wild.description: Returns a collection of all latest global assessments for taxa that are possibly extinct in the wild

threats_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given threat code

use_and_trade_list.description: Returns a list of use and trades

use_and_trade_assessments.description: Returns a collection of assessments for a given use and trade code

code.description: Code identifier for various classification schemes

name.description: Name identifier for various taxonomic groups

infra_name.description: Infraspecific component of scientific name (e.g. subspecies)
